title: Polymarket Traders Cut CLARITY Act Passage Odds to Record Low as Senate Delay Drags On
summary: Polymarket bettors have cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low as Senate negotiations over ethics provisions remain unresolved.
body:
Traders on the prediction market Polymarket have significantly lowered the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year, setting a new record low. The bill, which aims to provide clear regulatory guidelines for digital assets in the U.S., has stalled in the Senate due to ongoing negotiations over ethics provisions. The delay has led to increased uncertainty among market participants, who are now betting against the bill's passage in 2026.

As of the latest data, the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year have dropped to a record low, down from a high of 65% earlier this year. The Senate's inability to resolve key disagreements over the bill's ethics provisions has been the primary factor driving this decline. The CLARITY Act, if passed, would establish a comprehensive regulatory framework for digital assets, including cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies, in the United States.

The market's response to the delay highlights the growing skepticism among traders and investors about the bill's prospects. The CLARITY Act has been seen as a potential game-changer for the crypto industry, providing much-needed regulatory clarity. However, the prolonged delay and the lack of progress in the Senate have led many to question whether the bill will be passed this year. This uncertainty could have significant implications for the crypto market, as investors and businesses await clear regulatory guidelines.

For everyday people interested in the crypto space, the delay in the CLARITY Act's passage means continued uncertainty. Without clear regulations, the crypto market may remain volatile, and businesses may hesitate to invest in digital asset technologies. The next few months will be crucial, as the Senate's actions—or lack thereof—could shape the future of crypto regulation in the U.S. Watch for any updates from the Senate on the CLARITY Act's status, as these could provide clues about its chances of passing.
twitterThread: Polymarket traders just slashed the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low. The Senate's ethics stalemate is killing momentum.
The CLARITY Act aims to set clear U.S. rules for crypto, but Senate negotiations over ethics provisions have dragged on for months. Traders are betting it won't pass in 2026.

If you're in crypto, watch the Senate closely. The CLARITY Act's fate could shape the industry's future. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-19-polymarket-traders-slash-odds-of-clarity-act-passing-this-year
standaloneTweet: Polymarket traders just cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low. The Senate's ethics delay is making crypto's future murky. What's take?
